# Casa Schuck — Boutique Hotel in San Miguel de Allende

> A colonial sanctuary reimagined. Nine uniquely appointed rooms in the heart of San Miguel de Allende, Mexico.

## About Casa Schuck

Casa Schuck is a boutique hotel located at Garita 3, Centro, San Miguel de Allende, Guanajuato, Mexico (37700). Originally built in 1965, this restored colonial estate offers 9 uniquely designed suites, each with its own name and personality. The hotel is situated just two blocks from the Jardín Principal and the iconic Parroquia de San Miguel Arcángel.

## Key Facts

- **Location**: Garita 3, Centro, San Miguel de Allende, Guanajuato 37700, Mexico
- **Coordinates**: 20.9144° N, 100.7453° W
- **Rooms**: 9 uniquely appointed suites
- **Price Range**: $235 - $345 USD per night
- **Check-in**: 3:00 PM
- **Check-out**: 12:00 PM
- **Breakfast**: Gourmet breakfast included with every stay
- **Languages**: English, Spanish
- **Phone**: +52 415 152 0657
- **Email**: info@casaschuck.com
- **Website**: https://casaschuck.com

## Amenities

- Gourmet breakfast included daily
- Rooftop terrace with panoramic views of the Parroquia
- Courtyard garden with fountain
- In-room spa and massage services
- Concierge service with curated local experiences
- Free high-speed WiFi
- Air conditioning in all rooms

## Suites

Casa Schuck offers 9 uniquely named suites:
1. El Royal Suite — The flagship suite with colonial grandeur
2. La Biblioteca Suite — A book-lover's retreat
3. La Jacaranda — Named after the purple-blooming tree
4. La Luna — Moonlit serenity
5. El Cielo — Sky-inspired suite
6. El Sol — Sun-drenched warmth
7. El Amarillo — Golden tones
8. La Escondida — The hidden gem
9. La Vista — The room with a view

## Weddings & Events

Casa Schuck hosts intimate destination weddings for up to 60 guests. Wedding packages start at $8,500 USD. The property offers courtyard ceremonies and rooftop receptions, with full property buyout available. A traditional callejoneada through San Miguel's cobblestone streets can be arranged.

## Retreats & Groups

The hotel accommodates wellness retreats, yoga retreats, corporate retreats, and creative workshops. With only 9 rooms, groups enjoy complete privacy and personalized service.

## Seasonal Packages

- Día de Muertos Experience (October-November)
- Holiday Escape (December)
- Spring Renewal (March-April)

## Location Highlights

San Miguel de Allende is a UNESCO World Heritage Site consistently voted one of the best cities in the world. Key nearby attractions include:
- Jardín Principal (2 blocks)
- Parroquia de San Miguel Arcángel (2 blocks)
- Fábrica La Aurora art galleries (10 minutes)
- Hot springs (La Gruta, Escondido Place — 20 minutes)
- Guanajuato city (1.5 hours)

## Getting There

The nearest airport is Bajío International Airport (BJX) in León, approximately 1.5 hours by car. Shuttle services and private transfers are available.

## Social Media

- Instagram: @casaschuck
- Facebook: /casaschuck
